message:
fix(tests): improve querySelector mock to fall back to original

The mock was returning null for non-"main" selectors, which could cause
silent failures if internal library code used document.querySelector.
Now properly falls back to original method for unhandled selectors.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
